title: US and Iran peace proposals: Who wants what and why?

content:

title: Woman pleads not guilty to attempted murder of Rihanna after shooting at star's home
description: Rihanna and her partner A$AP Rocky were in a trailer at the time of the shooting, while her mother, their children and staff members were in the main house.
content:
A woman charged with the attempted murder of Rihanna following a shooting at the singer's home has pleaded not guilty.

title: Model jailed for conning 'easy prey' found on dating sites into funding luxury lifestyle
description: The judge says the 50-year-old did whatever it took to get her hands on money, and was a "financial predator always on the prowl for easy prey".
content:
